name: Durandel System
license: Text adapted from the Honorverse Wiki (Fandom), CC BY-SA.

location.notes: Canon places Durandel in the Andermani Empire (332 ly from Asgard, holding the Durandel Terminus of the Asgard Junction) but gives no distance to Manticore/Gregor. Placed near the Andermani cluster (~60 ly from Gregor); distance and bearing are fabricated (canon:false) to keep the cluster to the galactic west/left of Manticore per the reference fan map.

stars.name: Durandel
stars.notes: System existence is canon; spectral type not stated. G8 fabricated (canon:false) to support a habitable world and drive the hyper-limit lookup.

orbit.notes: Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 1.0 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).

bodies.name: Durandel III
bodies.lore: Fabricated habitable world (canon:false) — an Andermani colony world; canon names no specific planet in the Durandel System.

orbit.notes: Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 1.0 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).
Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 1.0 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).

places.name: Durandel Terminus
places.lore: A terminus of the Asgard Wormhole Junction (the Asgard System is not yet built, so this is lore only — no route-graph edge). 332 ly from Asgard.

position.notes: In-system position not specified; Asgard Junction not modelled yet.

demographics.notes: Population not captured in this pass.

lore.summary: An Andermani Empire system holding the Durandel Terminus of the Asgard Wormhole Junction (332 ly from Asgard). Bodies are fabricated (canon:false); canon establishes only the system, its empire, and the terminus.
lore.naming_convention: Durandel (the sword of Roland), fitting the Andermani martial flavour.

coordinates.notes: Fabricated (canon:false) from canon distance+bearing relative to gregor; Sol origin, +Z galactic north, +X galactic east.
